message.content: Cloud Infrastructure Discovery involves adversaries identifying resources within an IaaS environment, such as instances, VMs, and storage. They leverage APIs and CLI commands provided by cloud services (e.g., AWS DescribeInstances, GCP gcloud compute instances list, Azure az vm list) to gather information. This discovery helps adversaries plan further actions, like establishing persistence or altering configurations to expose data publicly. Common exploitation methods include using compromised access keys and open-source tools for resource enumeration. Mitigation strategies include implementing strict access controls, monitoring API usage, and employing anomaly detection to identify unusual discovery activities. Regular audits and least privilege principles can also reduce the risk of unauthorized resource discovery.
